title: Selenipedium × macrochilum giganteum
taxonomy: Selenipedium × macrochilum giganteum is a hybrid orchid, classified within the genus Selenipedium, which belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This genus is part of the subfamily Cypripedioideae, commonly known as the Venus slipper orchids. The family Orchidaceae is one of the largest and most diverse families in the plant kingdom, with over 30,000 known species. Within the kingdom Plantae, Selenipedium × macrochilum giganteum is classified as a flowering plant. As a member of the plant kingdom, it follows the hierarchical classification of kingdom, division, class, order, family, genus, and species.
